S.FORM: == satangahan : == misaydan, ising u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam : ťÜęÁĒü nu Amilika : physician or medical doctor nu Zipun : ŚĆĽŚłę u canan ku misaydan, ising (misaydan, isingśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == misajdan, isiŇč u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam : ** nu amir~…ĺika : pńßjsi ¶ian or m…ôdi ¶ar~…ĺ do ¶tor nu zipun : ** u ¶anan ku misajdan, isiŇč (misajdan, isiŇč***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * == mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == misaydan, ising u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam : ťÜęÁĒü nu Amilika : physician or medical doctor nu Zipun : ŚĆĽŚłę u canan ku misaydan, ising (misaydan, isingśėĮšĽÄťļľ?)ňź namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź ==
